title: Unwoven
description:
Unwoven is an isometric action twin-stick shooter where you battle hordes of cursed enemies. Defeat a variety of creatures, absorb their energy, unlock new powers, and explore a mansion filled with secrets as you uncover the story of Laima, her family, and the curse that haunts them, all brought to life through a visual style that blends Gothic Victorian aesthetics with Tim Burton-inspired art.

As you clear each room, the dynamic difficulty system, Fortune, adapts the challenge to your skill level. Traverse the Tapestry of Destiny, a magical loom that represents the mansion's interconnected rooms, and face an experience that evolves alongside you.

In Unwoven, the action never stops. This single-player twin-stick shooter combines frenetic combat, dynamic difficulty, and an atmospheric narrative set in a gothic universe.

Face waves of diverse enemies in ever-changing environments where every playthrough offers a different intensity.

The Fortune system redefines the experience: the game analyzes your performance and adjusts the difficulty in real time.

Have you mastered the curse? It will become more hostile toward your destiny.

Struggling to progress? You’ll find opportunities… but at a price.

Every decision, every strategy, and every victory shapes your path on the tapestry of fate.

Immerse yourself in a gothic aesthetic: a contrast between the macabre and the enchanting.

A universe woven with mystery, symbolism, and a narrative that unfolds as you play.
description_short: Face off against cursed creatures and protect Laima’s legacy in Unwoven®, a fast-paced twin-stick shooter. Explore a gothic mansion and vanquish the spawn of a family curse. But beware: fate will test your skills and make every path more challenging.
